title: pyrus viridis
intro: Pyrus viridis, also known as the green pear tree, is a species of tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family of flowering plants. The medicinal properties of Pyrus viridis lie in its bark and leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antibacterial agent, making it useful in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Pyrus viridis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and its extracts are also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
